snippets.text:
## route

app, feature, UI, backend, API, data, auth, scale, deploy, secure -> core/ARCHITECTURE plus methodology/PRODUCT when product shape is unclear.
database, cache, pipeline, schema, state, migrations -> core/DATA.
schema, contract, envelope, store, control plane, context pack, claim, machine surface -> core/INTERFACES.
workflow, testing, release, incident, product, platform, operating practice -> core/METHODOLOGY.
research, papers, seminal, theory, academic -> core/RESEARCH.
todo, validate, knowledge, context, capsule, container, health, policy, watcher, skill, eval -> core/PLUGINS.
intent contract, security contract, git behavior, amendment, system authority, evaluation governance ...

# core/PLUGINS
**Authority:** namespace-router
**Layer:** core
**Binding:** binding

Route Decapod subsystem capability questions into the correct operational surface and maturity expectation.

# core/ARCHITECTURE
**Authority:** namespace-router
**Layer:** core
**Binding:** binding

Route product and system-building intent into architecture concepts before implementation inference.

# core/DEMANDS
**Authority:** doctrine
**Layer:** core
**Binding:** binding

Interpret explicit human constraints, precedence, non-negotiables, and execution demands that modify raw intent.

# core/DOCS
**Authority:** namespace-router
**Layer:** core
**Binding:** binding

Route human-facing explanation, operator guidance, audits, and playbooks into the right documentation node.

# core/GAPS
**Authority:** doctrine
**Layer:** core
**Binding:** advisory

Classify missing doctrine, missing proof, unclear authority, drift, and incomplete system capability before work proceeds blindly.
